prompt: Write a complete 6-piece cold-email sequence targeting IP boutique law firms (2-25 attorneys, patent prosecution + litigation) for openpatent.ai. Persona pain: client intake at $400-$900/hr burned on 'is this idea protectable?' triage, $15k-$60k defensive publishing projects, junior-associate bottlenecks on prior-art searches, retainer attrition when clients self-serve. Deliver: (1) intro email (≤140 words, hook with 'turn your intake into a 90-second self-serve funnel, bill the $149 defensive tier as a passthrough, keep the $999+ premium clients'), (2) 5-day followup (≤100 words, name the 10+ jurisdiction legal framework: US 35 USC 102, EU eIDAS, UK Patents Act, China Hangzhou 2018, France Marseille 2025, WIPO 2022), (3) value-prop one-liner (≤25 words, attorney-graded prior art in 90 seconds), (4) 3 objection handlers ('AI will give bad legal advice', 'Our malpractice carrier will object', 'Clients want humans') each ≤60 words, (5) 1 anonymized case study (9-attorney firm in Chicago, replaced 3 hrs/week of intake triage with 90-sec disclosures, recovered $182k in freed-up senior-associate hours in Q1), (6) ROI line ('$149 defensive tier billed at $450 to client, 3x markup, 0 malpractice exposure, hash-chained audit log admissible'). Use DEFONEOS mythic voice. Return ONLY JSON: {intro:string, followup:string, value_prop:string, objection_handlers:[3 strings], case_study:string, roi:string, signature:string}.
